message:
feat(gateway): Add agent CLI auto-detection service and endpoint

Implements GET /api/agents/detected endpoint that:
- Detects installed agent CLIs (claude, codex, gemini, aider, gh-copilot)
- Detects setup tools (dcg, ubs, cass, cm, bd, bv, ru)
- Probes versions and authentication status
- Reports capabilities per CLI
- Caches results for 60 seconds (bypass with ?refresh=true)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
